creator: richard@tector.org.uk
text:
Update net/pear-Net_SMTP to 1.4.2

Required to fix the build of mail/pear-Mail when Net-SMTP is selected as a build option.

Fix: PORTNAME=      Net_SMTP
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.0
+PORTVERSION=   1.4.2
 CATEGORIES=    net mail www pear

 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
